use_codes.desc: METHOD OF SUPPORTING EMBRYO IMPLANTATION AND EARLY PREGNANCY BY SUPPLEMENTATION OF CORPUS LUTEAL FUNCTION AS PART OF AN ASSISTED REPRODUCTIVE TECHNOLOGY (ART) TREATMENT PROGRAM FOR INFERTILE WOMEN

indications.text:
MILPROSA™ is indicated to support embryo implantation and early pregnancy (up to 10 weeks post-embryo transfer) by
supplementation of corpus luteal function as part of an Assisted Reproductive Technology (ART) treatment program for
infertile women up to and including 34 years of age.
